description_long: This house features a single-story layout with a modern, open design and a spacious outdoor deck area. The exterior includes a large swimming pool surrounded by a wooden deck, several seating areas with tables and chairs, and lush landscaping with palm trees and potted plants. The house has multiple large windows, allowing for ample natural light, and a driveway leading up to the main entrance. The roof is flat, consistent with contemporary architectural styles, and the overall color palette is neutral with white and light wood tones. The interior appears to be divided into several rooms, including a living area, bedrooms, and a bathroom, all accessible from the central hallway. The outdoor spaces are seamlessly integrated with the indoor living areas, emphasizing relaxation and entertainment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a spacious wooden deck, and a swimming pool, surrounded by palm trees and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pool, deck area with seating, and part of the interior layout.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped path leading to the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the deck, pool, and some interior rooms.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the pool, outdoor seating, and the integration of indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a straight driveway, landscaped path, and a simple modern door without overhang or columns
